learn.title: Dividing by 5
learn.content: Count by 5s to find the quotient. For 35 ÷ 5: count 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35 — that's 7 counts. So 35 ÷ 5 = 7.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.7 Lesson 7.3 'Divide by 5' pp.273-276
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic F — Division Facts: Divide by 5
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Use ×5 Facts
learn.content: If 5 × 8 = 40, then 40 ÷ 5 = 8. Use your multiplication table of 5 in reverse. Think: 5 × ? = 40 → ? = 8.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.7 Lesson 7.3 'Divide by 5' pp.273-276
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic F — Division Facts: Divide by 5
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Think of Nickels
learn.content: Each nickel is 5¢. 25¢ ÷ 5¢ = 5 nickels. To find how many nickels make 45¢: count by 5s to 45 → 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45 → 9 counts. 45 ÷ 5 = 9 nickels.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.7 Lesson 7.3 'Divide by 5' pp.273-276
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic F — Division Facts: Divide by 5
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Number Line: Divide by 5
learn.content: For 45 ÷ 5: start at 45, jump back by 5 until you reach 0. Count: 45→40→35→30→25→20→15→10→5→0 — 9 jumps. So 45 ÷ 5 = 9.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.7 Lesson 7.3 'Divide by 5' pp.273-276
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic F — Division Facts: Divide by 5
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: The ÷5 Pattern
learn.content: All ÷5 quotients: 5÷5=1, 10÷5=2, 15÷5=3, 20÷5=4, 25÷5=5, 30÷5=6, 35÷5=7, 40÷5=8, 45÷5=9, 50÷5=10. Notice: each dividend ends in 0 or 5, and each quotient increases by 1.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.7 Lesson 7.3 'Divide by 5' pp.273-276
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic F — Division Facts: Divide by 5
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 5의 패턴 검증 — 끝자리로 빠른 점검
learn.content: ÷5의 답은 항상 정수 (피제수가 5의 배수일 때). 검증: 답 × 5 = 원래 수? 예: 35 ÷ 5 = 7 → 7 × 5 = 35 ✓. 예: 45 ÷ 5 = 9 → 9 × 5 = 45 ✓. 🔍 패턴 확인: 답 × 5 끝자리는 0(답 짝수일 때) 또는 5(답 홀수일 때). 흔한 실수 (M03): 30 ÷ 5 = 5 (답 6과 헷갈림) — 곱셈 검산으로 잡기.

verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic F — Division Facts: Divide by 5
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r2.question: Find the difference: 803 − 367.
practice_r2.explanation: 803−367: 3−7 borrow → 13−7=6; tens 9−6=3 (after lending across zero); hundreds 7−3=4. Result: 436.

practice_r3.explanation: 50 ÷ 5 = 10 teams. Two teams merge into 1: 10 − 1 = 9 teams.
hints: Step 1: 50 ÷ 5 = ? teams. Step 2: two become one → subtract 1.
50 ÷ 5 = 10 teams. Then 10 − 1 = 9 teams after the merge.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. 50 ÷ 5 = 10 teams. Two merge into one → 10 − 1 = 9.
